c74object.name: gemini
c74object.description: The gemini object allows you to send queries to the Google Gemini Large Language Model (LLM) using their REST API. It performs the request asynchronously in a background thread to avoid blocking the Max main thread.

inlet.description: Any symbol or list sent to the first inlet will be used as the prompt for the Gemini LLM.

outlet.description: The text response from the Gemini LLM will be output as a symbol.

method.name: anything
method.description: A symbol or list is taken as the query to be sent to the Gemini API.

attribute.name: apikey
attribute.description: Your Google Gemini API key. You can obtain one for free at https://aistudio.google.com/. This attribute is required for the object to function.

attribute.name: model
attribute.description: The name of the Gemini model to use (e.g., gemini-1.5-flash, gemini-1.5-pro). Defaults to gemini-1.5-flash.

attribute.name: version
attribute.description: The Gemini API version to use (e.g., v1, v1beta). Defaults to v1.
